provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Local Customary Law (Declaration) Order.

The declarations set out in the First, Second and Third Schedules to the Local Customary Law (Declaration) (No. 4) Order 1 are hereby directed to be the local customary law in respect of the subjects contained thererin in the area subject to the jurisdiction of the Pangani District Council and to be binding upon Africans to whom the local customary law relates. 1 G.N.
